Comment:
ALARM:
The customer informed us that they always need to force arm, etc due to zones not working correctly. We fixed the programming on 8 x zones down the south end of the site that were not programmed in correctly (not allocated to the expander). we also had to replace the resistors in 4 x detectors as they were not going into alarm (due to wrong resistor value).
The customer will now be able to arm without force arming the system.
We adjusted most of the fron external PIR's as they were not picking up very well. This was due to them being incorrectly set (set to 11m when they were 3 or 4m and sensitivity turned to the lowest). They pick up much better now and are not too sensitive.
We performed a firmware update on the main panel from V2 to V6 as it was very outdated and was causing issues with area lockouts, etc. Problems are resolved.
All detectors and sensors were tested, checked and accounted for except for 1 zone which we could not find - Lunchroom Door, which is showing as sealed and did not unseal. Also re terminate bus cables as can been seen in photos there was lots of copper exposed.

CCTV:

I have taken all IP and porting details of both NVR's onsite and will email Hayato (The operations manager at Japan Foods) and copy you in with what we require from his IT team so we can then open up the correct ports to allow app use.

IP Details are as follows for your record:
External IP to site - 58.96.75.72
NVR 1:
IP - 192.168.5.230
Server ID - JFT1
Server Name - JFT1
NVR 2:
IP - 192.168.5.231
Server ID - JFT2
Server Name - JFT2

Ports that need to be opened:
Live steam - 5150
Playback server - 5160
Management port - 80

Comment:
Attended site,  

Had to tone, test, terminate and label 2 x gateway cables (they were left behind the rack unlabelled) in building LN building. 

Had to trace back and find 1 x gateway cable that wasn't ran back to the rack after testing every port in the switch. (Could not tone from the gateway as it is on a very tall ceiling). PAC building.

Programmed into salto 2 x cu (for lifts), 5 x gateways and 14 x nodes and brought online.

Programmed all online doors to correct nodes on a PAC building and Sports Hall.

Put online doors of LN building into salto software and programmed. Off-line doors in this building are still on construction.

Did not have a list or mark up of all doors on LN building so we could not commission the off line doors. Asked Stephen, and the builder for a mark up but neither had one available.

Installed 2 x mullion readers

Could not fit 1 breakglass and 1 exit button as the builders have a custom bracket being made up to mount to. They also took the breakglass and exit button to have holes cut to suit devices. Mel or someone else may need to terminate as per below colours:

Blue - breakglass N/O

Also, could not link to gfa as fire cable was not ran to our controllers. We may need to talk Mel through terminating the gfa with a 12v relay if they run the cable to the power supply.

-replace breakglass with a better push in key type. And wire the second relay to an input on the controller to send an email when the breakglass is pushed.

-Remove internal snib spindle, and fit 570 blank plate on deadbolt
